chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 675 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2593/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.08.2022 None present for the petitioner. It appears that on the last date of hearing viz. 04.08.2022, learned counsel was put on notice to satisfy the Court on the point of maintainability of this petition. However, today he is called absent without any intimation. Perusal of the memo of petition shows that through instant petition, the petitioner seeks enforcement of contractual obligations, which dispute cannot be entertained and resolved by this Court, as the same required recording of pro and contra evidence of the parties, which does not come within the domain of this Court, under its constitutional jurisdiction, hence, this petition being not maintainable under the law is dismissed along with pending application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
